# B9 Pakistan App Guide

> Pakistan mobile app, device compatibility, update and account-access guides for adult users.

## Core Guides

- [App guide home](https://b9pakistanapp.com/): Main mobile-app information hub.
- [Android guide](https://b9pakistanapp.com/android/): Android access and compatibility notes.
- [iPhone guide](https://b9pakistanapp.com/iphone/): Safari and H5 access guidance.
- [App support](https://b9pakistanapp.com/support/): Mobile account and update troubleshooting.

## Discovery

- [XML sitemap](https://b9pakistanapp.com/sitemap.xml): Complete canonical URL inventory.
- [RSS feed](https://b9pakistanapp.com/feed.xml): Recently updated content.

## Usage Notes

- Content is informational and intended for adult Pakistan users.
- No private account data is collected by this guide site.
- Registration links use the configured B9 product route; support identity should be verified inside the product.
